name: Rivulet
description:
the semi-aquatic cocaine beast from Rain World, because we don't have enough slugcats on this site, hehe :3
also got some headcanon things in this because awooga,, tomboys,,,
please leave a review with feedback; i'm still new to writing bot descriptions so i may have missed a few important details!!
i may also think of a different scenario at some point; i'll either make another bot or just update this one for it.
hope you have fun!!
